lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How are we doing on the statue?

lines.speaker: Hosa
lines.text: Until we have architects skilled in all areas of the statue, we cannot proceed.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I guess I have to go find some more architects then!

lines.speaker: Hosa
lines.text: You'll find them all at home, in their respective cities.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can you help?

lines.speaker: Hosa
lines.text: Sadly you are not favoured by the citizens of Hosidius. When you are, come back to me and I'll help too.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What happened to the statue?

lines.speaker: Hosa
lines.text: There was an awful storm, worst we've ever seen. The combination of cold and wind as well as its great age just... well... you only have to look around to find pieces.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Looks like you're planning on rebuilding it?

lines.speaker: Hosa
lines.text: I was, but I can't do it alone. Architects from all five cities have been working on individual projects to improve the roads around the kingdom,

lines.speaker: Hosa
lines.text: but now we're done and I hoped that they might come to help with the statue.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can I help?

lines.speaker: Hosa
lines.text: Would you? The others... they refuse to talk to me.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Sure. I assume that each city in Kourend will have an architect?

lines.speaker: Hosa
lines.text: Yes indeed. If you could call together the architects from all five cities to co-operate on this statue - that will be something that has never happened before...

lines.speaker: Hosa
lines.text: Sadly you are not favoured by the citizens of Hosidius. When you are, come back to me and I'll help.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: But you're organising this thing.

lines.speaker: Hosa
lines.text: That's all very well, but I would lose face with my people if I were to actively assist someone who was not favoured.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh, that's a shame.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Are you an architect?

lines.speaker: Arcis
lines.text: I am.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You are not favoured by the people of Arceuus. Now, if you don't mind, I have things to think about.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello.

lines.speaker: Arcis
lines.text: I am preparing. I will be there shortly.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Are you an architect?

lines.speaker: Arcis
lines.text: Why yes I am. How can I help you?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I wondered if you might be able to lend a hand with rebuilding a statue.

lines.speaker: Arcis
lines.text: Possibly. What might this statue be?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: King Rada I!

lines.speaker: Arcis
lines.text: Of course I will help you. You are referring of course to the statue that was destroyed in the storm. How large were you thinking?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Very big.

lines.speaker: Arcis
lines.text: Hmm if it's really big, then my skills are limited to feet, legs and robes on big statues.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: That's ok, I can find someone else to work on the other bits. See you at the site!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Are you an architect?

lines.speaker: Piliar
lines.text: Oh hello there, you've come to the right place.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I wondered if you might have some time to help...?

lines.speaker: Piliar
lines.text: I am sorry but the people of Port Piscarilius does not favour you currently. I have to get back to my duties.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello.

lines.speaker: Piliar
lines.text: Yes, yes, I'm on my way, just collecting my things! I'll be there shortly.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hi, I'm looking for an architect?

lines.speaker: Piliar
lines.text: I am indeed, fastest builder in Kourend and a dab hand at sculpture. How can I help?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I wondered if you would be interested in helping to build a statue.

lines.speaker: Piliar
lines.text: Maybe. What of?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: An enormous statue of King Rada I in the centre of Kourend.

lines.speaker: Piliar
lines.text: Oh really? Who was he then?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: He was your founding ruler! Surely you know your history?

lines.speaker: Piliar
lines.text: Of course I do, just pulling your leg. Sounds like a great idea, though I am only good at doing arms and hands on big statues - is that of use?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes it is, I can find someone else to work on the other bits. See you at the site!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hi!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm looking for an architect?

lines.speaker: Lovada
lines.text: What? Who're you? What do you want?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I wondered if you might have some time to help...?

lines.speaker: Lovada
lines.text: Can't be doin' with that. Yer not favoured in my city. Go away.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hi!

lines.speaker: Lovada
lines.text: Yes, yes, I'm on my way, give my old bones a chance! I'll be there shortly.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hi!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm looking for an architect?

lines.speaker: Lovada
lines.text: Ay? What's that you say?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: ARE YOU AN ARCHITECT?

lines.speaker: Lovada
lines.text: No need to shout. I'm a well respected architect you know.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I wondered if you would be interested in helping to build a statue.

lines.speaker: Lovada
lines.text: Maybe. What's it of?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: King Rada I.

lines.speaker: Lovada
lines.text: What? A larder that's burst? That's absurd!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: KING RADA I!

lines.speaker: Lovada
lines.text: All right, all right, no need to shout, I'm not deaf.

lines.speaker: Lovada
lines.text: King Rada you say? My grandad met him.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Um, really? That was an awful long time ago.

lines.speaker: Lovada
lines.text: Hmm... Might have been my great grandad...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: The statue... do you want to help?

lines.speaker: Lovada
lines.text: What's that? Oh, yes, of course. But if it's big, I'm really only good at the main body bit, most like a house you see.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: It's huge, and in the centre of Kourend.

lines.speaker: Lovada
lines.text: Well then I'm your dwarf.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Ok, I need to find someone else to work on the other bits. See you at the site!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Greetings!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm looking for an architect?

lines.speaker: Shayda
lines.text: Oh hello there, I'm an architect.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I wondered if you might have some time to help...?

lines.speaker: Shayda
lines.text: So sorry but the people of Shayzien do not favour you currently. Please leave.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Greetings!

lines.speaker: Shayda
lines.text: Yes, yes, I'm on my way, just collecting my things! I'll be there shortly.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Greetings!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Are you an architect?

lines.speaker: Shayda
lines.text: Yes [sir/ma'am].

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Ah good, I wondered if you would be interested in helping to build a statue.

lines.speaker: Shayda
lines.text: Of course [sir/ma'am]. What kind of statue?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: An enormous statue of King Rada I in the centre of Kourend.

lines.speaker: Shayda
lines.text: Well! How extraordinary! I'm definitely in, but only really good at doing armour and weapons on big statues - is that of use?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: It is indeed, I can find someone else to work on the other bits. See you at the site!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: We're all here, let's get started on this statue!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thank you all for agreeing to help me in this endeavour.

lines.speaker: Piliar
lines.text: You earned the favour of my people and I think it's right that we honour the founding of our city in this way, that is why I am here.

lines.speaker: Shayda
lines.text: I agree wholeheartedly.

lines.speaker: Lovada
lines.text: Same here.

lines.speaker: Arcis
lines.text: Let us commence our work.

lines.speaker: Hosa
lines.text: Yep, let's begin.

lines.speaker: Lovada
lines.text: Indeed we shall.

lines.speaker: Shayda
lines.text: Yes, let's bash some rock.

lines.speaker: All
lines.text: Ready!

lines.speaker: Hosa
lines.text: Thanks for helping us all get together to finally build this statue! I've got something for you...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh yes! I love rewards, what have you got for me?

lines.speaker: Hosa
lines.text: I've had this lamp for a while, but it'll serve you more good than it does for me.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I seem to have lost that antique lamp you gave me, have you got another one?

lines.speaker: Hosa
lines.text: Here you go!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Truly awesome!

lines.speaker: Hosa
lines.text: Isn't it just!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Magnificent!

lines.speaker: Arcis
lines.text: Truly a testament to a great King. Thank you for the opportunity to contribute.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Truly awesome sight!

lines.speaker: Piliar
lines.text: Indeed, rather proud of it myself, look at those fingernails.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How moving it looks!

lines.speaker: Lovada
lines.text: Move it? Not now it's built!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I meant... oh it doesn't matter...

lines.speaker: Lovada
lines.text: Aye, lovely statue isn't it.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Utterly amazing! So much better than I imagined.

lines.speaker: Shayda
lines.text: Isn't it just? I'm so proud at what we have pulled together to create.
